questions.q: What video game developer recently issued a takedown of a YouTube channel showcasing "adult-oriented" mods for characters in their hit horror franchise?
Developer Hypixel Studios confirmed it is seeking legal action over an unauthorized Nintendo Switch eShop copycat of what upcoming sandbox RPG?
Which multiplayer pirate survival game announced it sold 500,000 copies just 48 hours after launching into Early Access in April 2026?

According to a recent podcast interview with Xbox's Matt Booty, the World of Warcraft and Diablo teams at Blizzard are currently assisting Playground Games with cinematics for what upcoming RPG reboot?
Former Intrepid Studios CEO Steven Sharif recently shared internal emails detailing a refusal to pay employee severance as part of an ongoing legal battle over the collapse of what Kickstarter MMO?
